surface_verification.justification: Backend triage producer (SessionStart-hook library); no web/CLI/API user surface. Reuses the existing action-unit triage schema (no message-contract or WebUI change), so no new frontend behavior to verify. The end-to-end path gh-JSON -> pr_ci_action_unit -> triage.jsonl is asserted by test_github_triage_pr_ci.py (26 tests incl. an explicit write->read round-trip), run within the 3127-test shared suite at F0.

behaviors.behavior: AC-1: emit one gh-pr-ci:{n} action-unit (severity high) for an open PR with >=1 failing check; payload starts /shipwright-iterate --type bug + PR URL + check names
AC-2: failing set = completed AND conclusion in {failure,timed_out,startup_failure,cancelled,action_required}; success/neutral/skipped/in-progress/queued excluded
AC-2: check names sorted, de-duplicated, control-chars sanitised (deterministic payload)
AC-3: symmetry - prs=None OR any per-PR check-runs fetch None poisons the whole sweep (no emit, no resolve; by_source None)
AC-4: differentiated auto-resolve - prChecksResolved (open+green), prMerged, prClosed
AC-4: gone-from-open PR with unfetchable state is kept open (no false prClosed guess)
AC-5: idempotent emit + frozen launchPayload across re-import
AC-6: emitted action-unit survives write->read round-trip through triage.jsonl (dedupKey/severity/kind/launchPayload intact)
AC-7: by_source['gh-pr-ci:'] telemetry carries emit count, or None on fetch failure
Refinement: draft PRs excluded from emission
Refinement: check-runs truncation guard - len(check_runs) < total_count returns None (>100-check false-green prevented)
Refinement: queries scoped - check-runs filter=latest (no stale rerun), pulls state=open
Refinement: import_findings provably calls github_pr_api.fetch_open_prs (hermetic stub can't hide a broken wire)
Resolver split: generic resolve_stale never touches gh-pr-ci items (only resolve_pr_ci does)
Fetch helpers (fetch_open_prs/fetch_pr_check_runs/fetch_pr_state) real impls: list/object extraction + None-on-failure
Live `gh` subprocess invocation inside github_api._gh_api (network round-trip)
behaviors.reason: the live gh/GitHub REST call is mocked at the _gh_api seam (reused, already covered by test_github_api.py); the real subprocess is non-deterministic and absent in CI
